description: CompositionPurple top made of 100% cotton, with raglan puffed sleeves and ruffled neckline with gathersWash care1. Wash dark colours separately2. Use mild detergent in warm water (maximum 40 degrees)3. Do not wring or bleach4. Flat dry in shade5. Do not iron on printFittingRegular FitGet ready for summer in this feminine purple top from jealous 21. The ruffled neckline and puffed sleeves give a dainty look. This top looks great when teamed with a simple white skirt and ballerina flats for a day out with friends. Model's statistics1. The model wears size M in t-shirts2. Height-5.6", Chest-32"
